parsed_review.summary: PASS for CP00-758 (RP25 Migration Platform permission-and-audit binding + synthetic fixture descriptor pack), based on read-only source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob. Verified: (1) Pack binding registry.js:43 matches the baseline exactly — risk B, 40 units, range RP25.P01.M04.S07-RP25.P01.M06.S04, next CP00-759/RP25.P01.M06.S05; section requirements (M04=14, M05=22, M06=4 = 40) and deliverable distribution (impl 22/ui 6/fixture 2/test 6/hermes 2/claude 2) reconcile with included_units and the manifest plan_binding_snapshot. (2) Implementation (service.js, validators.js, mappers.js, import-plan.js, index.js) is internally consistent; coverage/descriptor validators enforce pack identity, distribution, descriptor-only and no-leak invariants; descriptors are deep-frozen. (3) No-write/no-real-data/no-runtime boundary is enforced in code, not merely asserted — no fetch/http/exec/fs-write/process.env/credential paths exist in packages/migration; the only file write is the validator's local contract build artifact (not product state). (4) Authority boundary preserved: createDescriptor (service.js:110) sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-759; claude_packet read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false/writes_product_state=false (deterministic evidence/receipt handling only, not product runtime). (5) Evidence is valid hardened evidence: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, non-empty valid JSON); command-evidence.json shows all 10 required validation commands plus npm test/build at exit_code 0; test summaries report 10/10 migration and 2958/2958 full-suite passing, 0 fail; contract shows latest_pack=CP00-758, latest_projection=MigrationPlatformCp758PermissionFixtureDescriptor, validation.valid=true with no "valid": false. Provenance note: command/test outcomes are harness-reported and were not independently re-executed under the read-only constraint, but were corroborated by source-level consistency (which is the designed source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used basis; summary_only_review is prohibited and was not used). The pending claude-review-result.json/construction-inspection.json/adjudication.md values are the expected pre-review snapshot that this single valid receipt finalizes — not defects. Closeout still depends on the harness normalizing exactly this one valid review receipt; pack closeout is not blocked by this review. The pack claims only migration_platform_permission_fixture_descriptor_verified (manifest production_ready/runtime_ready currently false pending this review), not runtime or enterprise trust, so blocks_goal_closeout=false; human final approval for any future runtime/enterprise-trust opening remains required but is outside this CP's descriptor-verified scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
